title: ErrorNumber Property, Spel Class
description: Returns the error number from the last command executed. Not available at design time.
notes:
The error number returned is a SPEL+ error number. For details, see your SPEL+ Language manual.

Data Type

Long
see_also:
ErrorMessage Property

Reply Property

ErrorNumber Property Example

Dim lastErr As Integer

lastErr = m_spel.ErrorNumber
examples:
Dim lastErr As Integer

lastErr = m_spel.ErrorNumber
